title: dubautia demissifolia
intro: Dubautia demissifolia, also known as the Hawaiian Swamp Dubautia, is a rare and endangered flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. This plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dubautia demissifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, such as arthritis and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by applying the crushed leaves topically to the affected area.
